identity.name: Solar Corporate Premium – Emergent
identity.archetype: Jewel & Luxury mixed with Performance Pro

headings.usage: All section titles, hero headings, card titles

primary.name: Deep Solar Blue
primary.usage: Headings, Primary Buttons Border, Footer Background

secondary.name: Solar Gold
secondary.usage: Highlight text, Icons, Secondary Buttons, Hover states

cta.name: Eco Green
cta.usage: Primary Call-to-Action Buttons, Success States, Price Savings

glassmorphism.card: backdrop-filter backdrop-blur-lg bg-opacity-30 border-t border-l border-white/30 shadow-2xl rounded-2xl

buttons.primary_cta: bg-[#00C389] text-white hover:bg-[#00A372] shadow-lg hover:shadow-green-500/30 transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold tracking-wide
buttons.secondary_gold: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#F5A623] to-[#FFD166] text-[#071A2E] hover:shadow-amber-500/30 shadow-md rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#0B3C5D] text-[#0B3C5D] hover:bg-[#0B3C5D] hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-colors

cards.feature: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-xl hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-300 border border-slate-100 p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 group
cards.glass_float: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-2xl rounded-3xl p-8

inputs.style: bg-white/50 border border-slate-200 focus:border-[#0B3C5D] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0B3C5D]/20 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none transition-all backdrop-blur-sm

hero_section.features: Large Gold Gradient Text, Glowing Green CTA, Background Image with Dark Overlay

section_alternation.pattern: Dark Hero -> Light Features -> White/Glass Calculator -> Light Comparison -> Dark Footer

universal_guidelines: Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs (p-8, p-12).
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover lift, scale).
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Do NOT use complete transparent background in header/overlays with content under it.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
instructions_to_main_agent: Apply this design system to all pages. Prioritize the Homepage overhaul first. Use the Glassmorphism effect on the Calculator and Feature cards. Ensure the 'Get Quote' and 'Book Survey' buttons use the Green CTA style with Glow.
